overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along an elevated riverside sidewalk toward downtown Los Santos during golden hour. The character passes a large Suburban billboard and navigates across a busy multi-lane intersection with city buses and muscle cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated riverside walkway with highway overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated concrete pathway toward the downtown skyline

entered.detail: large metal lattice electricity pylon visible at the start of the path
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers silhouetted against the setting sun
tall palm trees lining the left side of the concrete walkway
multi-lane highway running parallel to the walkway with vehicles passing by
elevated concrete pathway with visible seams and weathering

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated concrete pathway with the downtown Los Santos skyline visible ahead against the golden hour sun. A large power transmission tower stands prominently on the left initially before receding into the distance, while palm trees line the walkway. The highway runs parallel on the right with sparse traffic moving along it.

events.description: city bus enters the frame from the right, driving along the highway
approaching intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk past the Suburban billboard, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: city bus driving along the highway parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with 'SUBURBAN' text in bold black letters
tall street lamps lining the highway
long white and red public transit bus
overhead traffic signal ganttry at the upcoming intersection
metal fence with construction barriers near the intersection

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the curved sidewalk, the character passes a large 'Suburban' billboard on the left. A city bus becomes visible on the right side of the highway, driving parallel to the walkway. The path leads toward an intersection with traffic lights and a chain-link fence with construction barriers visible on the left.

events.description: character steps onto the asphalt crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane road
black muscle car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection, navigating through traffic including a black muscle car and city bus

notable_agents.action: black muscle car driving through the intersection
city bus moving through or stopped at the intersection

entered.detail: paved road surface with white crosswalk lines and red curb markings
classic black American muscle car with chrome details
white sedan waiting at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and steps onto the asphalt crosswalk to cross the multi-lane road. Vehicles including a black muscle car and the city bus move through the intersection as the character navigates across. The downtown skyline remains visible ahead throughout the crossing, with traffic lights and street infrastructure surrounding the crossing area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated riverside pathway that transitions from a quiet industrial edge into a bustling urban intersection. It begins with the character walking past a prominent power transmission tower and palm trees, with the downtown Los Santos skyline glowing under the golden hour sun ahead. As the camera follows the curve of the sidewalk, the scene shifts past a large Suburban billboard and a city bus driving parallel on the adjacent highway. The path then leads toward a chain-link fence and construction barriers before the character steps off the concrete and onto the asphalt of a multi-lane crosswalk. Finally, the movement concludes as the character navigates through the intersection amidst a black muscle car and city traffic, keeping the distant skyline centered in view.
